Explore SolutionsBook a Demo

Who we are

Vertical software,
built for Asia

Spica Technologies is a pan-Asian builder of vertical market software — specialised, mission-critical platforms designed for a focused set of public and private sector industries. We develop and operate software businesses that deliver high-impact solutions tailored to the specific workflows of the customers we serve.

One mission

We build customer-empowering, community-engaging and operationally-excellent vertical software that benefits organisations, professionals and end-users alike.

Collective capability

Our teams share a common culture of entrepreneurship, craftsmanship and innovative strength — with the focus to serve industries deeply rather than broadly.

Deep domain focus

Every platform we ship is purpose-built for the industry it runs in — not a generic tool retrofitted to fit mission-critical workflows.

Autonomous teams

Our product groups operate as independent enterprises within a decentralised model — close to customers, accountable for their own roadmap, on a shared agentic AI backbone.

Solutions

Software that runs
entire industries

Purpose-built vertical platforms with agentic AI woven into every layer.

01

Vertical-First Engineering

Every product is architected for a single industry. Domain rules, compliance logic, and workflow patterns encoded directly into the platform.

02

Agentic AI Core

Products ship with AI agents that execute multi-step workflows, make domain-aware decisions, and learn continuously from operational data.

03

Mission-Critical Grade

99.99% uptime, end-to-end encryption, SOC 2 compliance, and data sovereignty. Built for industries that cannot afford failure.

04

Adaptive Intelligence

Software that compounds intelligence over time. Agents surface better automations and deeper insights with every interaction.

Spica HQ — Engineering Hub

Agentic AI

From record-keeping
to autonomous action

Our agentic framework sits inside every product — understanding context, making decisions, executing workflows end-to-end.

01
Autonomous Execution
Agents handle multi-step workflows like permit approvals, invoice matching, and patient scheduling — zero human input.
02
Domain-Trained Models
Each agent is trained on vertical data — building codes, clinical protocols, logistics rules — for expert-level precision.
03
Human-in-the-Loop
High-stakes decisions surface for review. Routine ones execute instantly. You configure the boundaries.
// spica.agentic.framework
agent PermitProcessor {
  domain: "municipal_gov"
  async process(app) {
    const r = await this.validate(app)
    return r.risk < threshold
      ? this.approve(app)
      : this.escalate(app)
  }
}

Industries

Deep roots across verticals

We build for industries where software is mission-critical and AI unlocks transformational efficiency.

Government

Permits, licensing, records

Healthcare

Clinical workflows, compliance

Logistics

Agriculture

Leadership

Andy Chan

Vice President, Corporate Development — Asia Division

With deep expertise in vertical market software and a conviction that industry-specific AI agents will reshape how businesses operate, Andy founded Spica Technologies to build the next generation of intelligent, mission-critical platforms across Asia.

"Every industry has workflows that experts do on autopilot. Our job is to encode that expertise into software that acts."

Process

How we build

01

Discover

We embed with your teams to map workflows, pain points, and domain logic no generic tool captures.

02

Architect

Purpose-built data models, compliance frameworks, and integration layers for your vertical.

03

Ship + Agent

Production software with agentic AI embedded — not bolted on. Agents act on domain data from day one.

04

Evolve

Continuous deployment. Agents learn from usage, we ship improvements driven by live operational data.
